name: Asparagas Ham Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Frozen cut asparagus, thawed (10 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In two greased 9-inch pie plates, layer the asparagus, ham, cheese, and onion.
2. In a bowl, beat the eggs.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the beaten eggs and mix well.
4. Divide the mixture in half and pour over the layered filling in each pie plate.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
